{{Quote|I hope we can be together soon…|Janelle in a holocube message to her husband|<ref name="Empire 28">[[Empire 28|''Empire'' 28]]</ref>}}
'''Janelle Harcourt''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the wife of [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Aron Harcourt]].

==Biography==
After Aron was demoted to a desk job after being scapegoated for the destruction of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Anya Karu]]'', she and her husband settled on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where Aron took a desk job. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], more than three years after Janelle's [[Death/Legends|death]], Aron hired [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to retrieve a holorecording of his late wife from the wreckage of ''Anya Karu''. Failing to pay the bounty hunter upon completion of his mission, Fett killed Aron.
